author: gb9t
content: Iter 94 result: net/ipv4/route.md (IPv4 routing core - route.c ~3799 + fib_trie.c ~3041 + fib_frontend.c ~1713; per-route Rtable + per-table FibTable LC-Trie + per-route FibInfo (gw/dev/prefsrc/metrics/multipath) + per-flow flowi4 + ip_route_output_flow + ip_route_input_noref/_slow + per-CPU rt_cache + ICMP redirect + PMTU update + per-namespace tables + ECMP multipath) + virt/kvm/x86-mmu-zap.md (KVM MMU SPTE invalidation - in mmu.c ~600-800 lines + tdp_mmu.c; kvm_zap_gfn_range / kvm_mmu_zap_all / kvm_mmu_zap_all_fast via mmu_valid_gen + per-mmu-notifier callbacks (unmap_gfn_range/age_gfn/test_age_gfn/set_pte_gfn) + per-vCPU INVLPG/INVPCID + zap_collapsible_sptes for THP merge + kvm_flush_remote_tlbs IPI). 138 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/ipv4/ip_input.md (IPv4 RX path) + virt/kvm/x86-pdptr.md (PDPTR PAE-paging virtualization).
